phrases.intent_en: Can I climb the ancient tower walls?
phrases.cultural_note: Protecting historical structures is strictly enforced in Turkey.

phrases.intent_en: How do I pay for tram to park stop?
phrases.cultural_note: Payment methods can vary; it's best to ask staff directly.

likely_response.translation_en: Buy from the ticket machine at the stop.

responses.english: Buy from the ticket machine at the stop.

phrases.intent_en: Can I climb the ancient tower walls?
phrases.cultural_note: Historical structures are strictly protected in Turkey.

likely_response.local: Hayır, eski kule duvarlarına tırmanmak yasaktır.
likely_response.translation_en: No, climbing the ancient tower walls is forbidden.

responses.english: No, climbing the ancient tower walls is forbidden.
responses.french: Hayır, eski kule duvarlarına tırmanmak yasaktır.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the Hıdırlık Tower path?
phrases.cultural_note: Turkish parks often have multiple paths; staff can give the safest route.

likely_response.translation_en: From the Kaleiçi side, on the right.

responses.english: From the Kaleiçi side, on the right.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the Nâzım Hikmet monument?
phrases.cultural_note: Monuments are spread across the park; asking staff is most reliable.

likely_response.local: Ana yoldan devam edin, sola dönün.
likely_response.translation_en: Continue on the main path, turn left.

responses.english: Continue on the main path, turn left.
responses.french: Ana yoldan devam edin, sola dönün.

phrases.intent_en: How do I pay for tram to park stop?
phrases.cultural_note: Payment methods can vary; the driver will have the latest info.

likely_response.translation_en: Get an AntalyaKart from the ticket machine at the stop.

responses.english: Get an AntalyaKart from the ticket machine at the stop.

phrases.intent_en: Are the cliff paths safe to walk?
phrases.text_local: Uçurum kenarındaki yollar yürümek için güvenli mi?
phrases.cultural_note: A direct, safety-focused reply is typical for park rules.
